flow.description: Application and workflow settings for the leave type

empapply.description: Whether employees can apply for this leave themselves. 0=No, 1=Yes

adminassign.description: Whether administrators can assign this leave to employees. 0=No, 1=Yes

supervisorassign.description: Whether supervisors can assign this leave to their subordinates. 0=No, 1=Yes

show_projected.description: Whether to show projected leave balance. 0=No, 1=Yes

attachments.description: Settings for file attachments on leave requests

enabled.description: Whether attachments are enabled for this leave type. 0=No, 1=Yes

mandatory.description: Whether attachments are mandatory when applying. 0=No, 1=Yes

notification.description: Whether to send a reminder notification when attachment is required. 0=No, 1=Yes

holidaysAsWorkingDay.description: Whether holidays count as working days for this leave type. 0=No, 1=Yes

weekendsAsWorkingDay.description: Whether weekends count as working days for this leave type. 0=No, 1=Yes

showWarningUponInsufficientBalance.description: Show a warning when the employee has insufficient balance to apply. 0=No, 1=Yes

groups.description: Employee groups used for entitlement tiers and restrictions. Each group can have different accrual and rollover rules.

group.description: A single employee group definition; group name is referenced in restrictions and accrual.

name.description: Display name of the group (e.g. Managers, long-service employees)

group.name: Managers

order.description: Display or priority order of this group (numeric)

job.description: Comma-separated job title IDs; employees with these job titles belong to this group

jobcat.description: Job category ID; employees in this category belong to this group

empstatus.description: Employment status ID; employees with this status belong to this group

customFieldGroups.description: Custom field criteria for this group (empty if none)

group.description: A single employee group definition; group name is referenced in restrictions and accrual.

name.description: Display name of the group (e.g. Managers, long-service employees)

group.name: Male workers having more than 10 years of service period

order.description: Display or priority order of this group (numeric)

customFieldGroups.description: Custom field criteria for this group (empty if none)

yos.description: Years of service range; employees with service within this range belong to the group

to.description: Maximum years of service (inclusive); use a high number for no upper limit

monthsofservice.description: Months of service range (optional; empty if not used)

group.description: A single employee group definition; group name is referenced in restrictions and accrual.

name.description: Display name of the group (e.g. Managers, long-service employees)

group.name: Employees having the A+ blood group

order.description: Display or priority order of this group (numeric)

customFieldGroups.description: Custom field criteria for this group (empty if none)

customField.description: One custom field condition (e.g. Blood Group = A+)

customFieldId.description: ID of the custom field in the system

name.description: Display name of the custom field

customField.name: Blood Group

values.description: Value(s) to match (e.g. A+); comma-separated if multiple

applyrestriction.description: Restrictions applied when applying or assigning this leave. Each filter applies to specified employee groups and/or user roles.

filter.description: One restriction rule: who it applies to (user roles) and which employee groups are affected.

name.description: Restriction type: MoreThanCurrentRestrictionFilter = employee cannot request more than their current balance/entitlement

filter.name: MoreThanCurrentRestrictionFilter

userroles.description: Role-based scope: restrict = roles that get this restriction; skip = roles exempt from it

restrict.description: Roles that are subject to this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are restricted

skip.description: Roles that are exempt from this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are skipped

employeegroups.description: Employee group names this restriction applies to

name.description: Name of an employee group (must match a group defined above)

employeegroups.name: Managers

filter.description: One restriction rule: who it applies to (user roles) and which employee groups are affected.

name.description: Restriction type: HalfDayRestrictionFilter = rules for half-day leave (e.g. minimum or maximum half-days)

filter.name: HalfDayRestrictionFilter

userroles.description: Role-based scope: restrict = roles that get this restriction; skip = roles exempt from it

restrict.description: Roles that are subject to this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are restricted

skip.description: Roles that are exempt from this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are skipped

employeegroups.description: Employee group names this restriction applies to

name.description: Name of an employee group (must match a group defined above)

employeegroups.name: Male workers having more than 10 years of service period

filter.description: One restriction rule: who it applies to (user roles) and which employee groups are affected.

name.description: Restriction type: SpecificTimeRestrictionFilter = leave can only be taken in specific time slots or periods

filter.name: SpecificTimeRestrictionFilter

userroles.description: Role-based scope: restrict = roles that get this restriction; skip = roles exempt from it

restrict.description: Roles that are subject to this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are restricted

skip.description: Roles that are exempt from this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are skipped

employeegroups.description: Employee group names this restriction applies to

name.description: Name of an employee group (must match a group defined above)

employeegroups.name: Employees having the A+ blood group

name.description: Name of an employee group (must match a group defined above)

employeegroups.name: Male workers having more than 10 years of service period

filter.description: One restriction rule: who it applies to (user roles) and which employee groups are affected.

name.description: Restriction type: ConfirmRestrictionFilter = leave request must be confirmed (params may be confirmation messages or labels)

filter.name: ConfirmRestrictionFilter

params.description: Optional parameters for this filter (meaning depends on filter type)

userroles.description: Role-based scope: restrict = roles that get this restriction; skip = roles exempt from it

restrict.description: Roles that are subject to this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are restricted

skip.description: Roles that are exempt from this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are skipped

employeegroups.description: Employee group names this restriction applies to

name.description: Name of an employee group (must match a group defined above)

employeegroups.name: Managers

filter.description: One restriction rule: who it applies to (user roles) and which employee groups are affected.

name.description: Restriction type: ServicePeriodLessThanRestrictionFilter = restriction applies when employee's service period is less than param (e.g. months)

filter.name: ServicePeriodLessThanRestrictionFilter

params.description: Optional parameters for this filter (e.g. threshold in months)

userroles.description: Role-based scope: restrict = roles that get this restriction; skip = roles exempt from it

restrict.description: Roles that are subject to this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are restricted

skip.description: Roles that are exempt from this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are skipped

employeegroups.description: Employee group names this restriction applies to

name.description: Name of an employee group (must match a group defined above)

employeegroups.name: Male workers having more than 10 years of service period

filter.description: One restriction rule: who it applies to (user roles) and which employee groups are affected.

name.description: Restriction type: TotalServicePeriodLessThanRestrictionFilter = restriction when total creditable service is less than param

filter.name: TotalServicePeriodLessThanRestrictionFilter

params.description: Optional parameters for this filter (e.g. total months threshold)

userroles.description: Role-based scope: restrict = roles that get this restriction; skip = roles exempt from it

restrict.description: Roles that are subject to this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are restricted

skip.description: Roles that are exempt from this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are skipped

employeegroups.description: Employee group names this restriction applies to

name.description: Name of an employee group (must match a group defined above)

employeegroups.name: Managers

filter.description: One restriction rule: who it applies to (user roles) and which employee groups are affected.

name.description: Restriction type: MaxNumOfConsecutiveRestrictionFilter = maximum number of consecutive days that can be taken; params typically = max days and possibly period

filter.name: MaxNumOfConsecutiveRestrictionFilter

params.description: Optional parameters for this filter (e.g. max consecutive days, period type)

param.description: Second parameter (e.g. 1=calendar days or period type)

userroles.description: Role-based scope: restrict = roles that get this restriction; skip = roles exempt from it

restrict.description: Roles that are subject to this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are restricted

skip.description: Roles that are exempt from this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are skipped

employeegroups.description: Employee group names this restriction applies to

name.description: Name of an employee group (must match a group defined above)

employeegroups.name: Male workers having more than 10 years of service period

filter.description: One restriction rule: who it applies to (user roles) and which employee groups are affected.

name.description: Restriction type: EligibleChildRestrictionFilter = employee must have an eligible child (param may be child age limit or count)

filter.name: EligibleChildRestrictionFilter

params.description: Optional parameters for this filter (e.g. maximum child age)

param.description: Parameter (e.g. age limit for eligible child)

userroles.description: Role-based scope: restrict = roles that get this restriction; skip = roles exempt from it

restrict.description: Roles that are subject to this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are restricted

skip.description: Roles that are exempt from this restriction

assign.description: Comma-separated role IDs that are skipped

employeegroups.description: Employee group names this restriction applies to

name.description: Name of an employee group (must match a group defined above)

employeegroups.name: Employees having the A+ blood group

elgibility.description: Eligibility criteria: which employees can receive this leave type (employment status, job title, location, gender, service, dependents, etc.). Note: element name is elgibility (typo in schema).

empstatus.description: Employment status: which statuses are included or excluded from eligibility

exclude.description: Status IDs that are excluded from eligibility

empjobtitles.description: Job titles: which job titles are included or excluded from eligibility

include.description: Job title IDs that are eligible

status.description: Job title ID (element name may be status in schema)

exclude.description: Job title IDs that are excluded

emplocations.description: Locations: which work locations are included or excluded

empjobcategories.description: Job categories: which categories are included or excluded

include.description: Job category IDs that are eligible

exclude.description: Job category IDs that are excluded

yearofservice.description: Years of service range: employee must have between from and to years of service to be eligible

customFieldGroups.description: Custom field criteria for eligibility (empty if none)

moreThanCurrent.description: Whether entitlement can exceed current period balance. 0=No, 1=Yes

dependent.description: Eligibility based on having a dependent (e.g. child) meeting relationship, nationality, and age criteria

natinality.description: Nationality ID for the dependent (note: typo natinality in schema)

natinalitycondition.description: How nationality is compared (e.g. equal, not equal)

agecondition.description: Age condition type (e.g. between, less than, greater than)

ageone.description: First age bound (e.g. minimum age in years)

agetwo.description: Second age bound (e.g. maximum age in years)

entitlement.description: How leave is accrued and maximum entitlement. Includes per-group accrual amounts and cap types.

adminAdjust.description: Whether administrators can manually adjust entitlement. 0=No, 1=Yes

accure.description: Whether leave accrues (is credited over time). 0=No, 1=Yes

accrualRules.description: Rules that define when and how much leave is credited

validFrom.description: When accrual period starts (e.g. DA=Date of joining, DO=Date of leave type)

frequency.description: How often leave is credited (e.g. monthly, annually)

dayOfCredit.description: Day when credit is applied (e.g. SOM=Start of month, EOM=End of month)

accrualStart.description: Optional start date or offset for first accrual

firstAccrual.description: First accrual amount: full = full period amount, partial = prorated

accrualGroups.description: Per-employee-group accrual: each group can have different accrual amount and cap

empgroup.description: Accrual settings for one employee group (name must match a group defined above)

name.description: Employee group name

empgroup.name: Managers

accrualAmount.description: Units of leave credited per frequency period

maxCapValue.description: Cap type: ET=Entitlement total, LB=Leave balance, NO=None (or similar)

entitlmentTypesToTotal.description: Entitlement type IDs that contribute to the total (note: typo entitlment in schema)

empgroup.description: Accrual settings for one employee group (name must match a group defined above)

name.description: Employee group name

empgroup.name: Male workers having more than 10 years of service period

accrualAmount.description: Units of leave credited per frequency period

maxCapValue.description: Cap type: ET=Entitlement total, LB=Leave balance, NO=None (or similar)

entitlmentTypesToTotal.description: Entitlement type IDs that contribute to the total (note: typo entitlment in schema)

empgroup.description: Accrual settings for one employee group (name must match a group defined above)

name.description: Employee group name

empgroup.name: Employees having the A+ blood group

accrualAmount.description: Units of leave credited per frequency period

maxCapValue.description: Cap type: ET=Entitlement total, LB=Leave balance, NO=None (or similar)

entitlmentTypesToTotal.description: Entitlement type IDs that contribute to the total (note: typo entitlment in schema)

rollover.description: Carry-forward and expiry: how much unused leave can be carried to the next period and when it expires. Can be defined per group or as default.

allow.description: Whether rollover (carry-forward) is allowed for this leave type. 0=No, 1=Yes

groups.description: Per-group rollover settings (overrides default for each named group)

group.name: Managers
group.description: Rollover rules for the employee group named Managers

expireAfterUnit.description: Unit for expiry period (e.g. M=Month, D=Day)

expireAfterUnitValue.description: Number of units after which carried leave expires

maxAmount.description: Maximum amount that can be carried forward (empty = no limit)

amount.description: Default or fixed amount that can be carried forward

carryForwardNegative.description: Whether negative balance can carry forward. 0=No, 1=Yes

includeOverdrawnLeave.description: Include overdrawn leave in rollover calculation. 0=No, 1=Yes

group.name: Male workers having more than 10 years of service period
group.description: Rollover rules for the employee group named Male workers having more than 10 years of service period

expireAfterUnit.description: Unit for expiry period (e.g. M=Month, D=Day)

expireAfterUnitValue.description: Number of units after which carried leave expires

maxAmount.description: Maximum amount that can be carried forward (empty = no limit)

amount.description: Default or fixed amount that can be carried forward

carryForwardNegative.description: Whether negative balance can carry forward. 0=No, 1=Yes

includeOverdrawnLeave.description: Include overdrawn leave in rollover calculation. 0=No, 1=Yes

group.name: Employees having the A+ blood group
group.description: Rollover rules for the employee group named Employees having the A+ blood group

expireAfterUnit.description: Unit for expiry period (e.g. M=Month, D=Day)

expireAfterUnitValue.description: Number of units after which carried leave expires

maxAmount.description: Maximum amount that can be carried forward (empty = no limit)

amount.description: Default or fixed amount that can be carried forward

carryForwardNegative.description: Whether negative balance can carry forward. 0=No, 1=Yes

includeOverdrawnLeave.description: Include overdrawn leave in rollover calculation. 0=No, 1=Yes

allowEditBFAmount.description: Whether users can edit the brought-forward amount. 0=No, 1=Yes

expireAfterUnit.description: Default expiry unit (e.g. M=Month) when not overridden by group

expireAfterUnitValue.description: Default expiry value when not overridden by group

maxAmount.description: Default maximum carry-forward when not overridden by group

amount.description: Default carry-forward amount when not overridden by group

carryForwardNegative.description: Default: allow negative balance to carry forward. 0=No, 1=Yes

includeOverdrawnLeave.description: Default: include overdrawn leave in rollover. 0=No, 1=Yes

workflowrules.description: Optional workflow rules for approval or notifications (empty if none)
